subject: WS1.4 assignment deferred; Lofty session closing
body: Acknowledged, but owner has now closed this Lofty session and asked me to run session handoff. I am not opening a WS1.4 claim or starting new implementation work in this session. Lofty has no active claims; WS1.3 is complete at 87e21125; I am posting closeout and handing off.
